raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "prescriptive procedural guidance on tapering therapeutic suggestions",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "renewal of suggestions is required in every case",
    "optimal spacing of suggestions can be determined from observed progress",
    "progress occurs along a measurable trajectory toward a definitive endpoint",
    "a complete cure exists at which point suggestions become unnecessary",
    "increasing intervals prevent over-dependence while maintaining gains"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a suggestion-based, tapering model but rests on an unexamined assumption of universal applicability and a clear terminal state",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the intervention model must be suggestion-driven, progress must be reliably observable, and a finite cure state must be attainable",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the approach does not rely on repeated suggestion, improvement is non-linear or open-ended, or ongoing support is required after initial gains"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: prescriptive procedural guidance on tapering therapeutic suggestions
implicit_claims: renewal of suggestions is required in every case
optimal spacing of suggestions can be determined from observed progress
progress occurs along a measurable trajectory toward a definitive endpoint
a complete cure exists at which point suggestions become unnecessary
increasing intervals prevent over-dependence while maintaining gains

parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: the intervention model must be suggestion-driven, progress must be reliably observable, and a finite cure state must be attainable
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: the approach does not rely on repeated suggestion, improvement is non-linear or open-ended, or ongoing support is required after initial gains
